title: Traveling through time : the Forum guide to longitudinal data systems : effectively managing LDS data
content:
# Traveling through time : the Forum guide to longitudinal data systems : effectively managing LDS data

Contributors: national forum on education statistics (u.s.), national center for education statistics, institute of education sciences (u.s.)
Date: 2011
Subjects: planning, education, united states, educational statistics, student records

"Book three: Effectively managing LDS data"--Spine. "February 2011"--P. ii. "NFES 2011-805"--P. [4] of cover. Format not distributed to depository libraries. Includes bibliographical references (79-80). Description based on print version record; resource not viewed.
